title: Khosla’s Keith Rabois backs Comp, which wants to bolster HR teams with AI
description: The HR tech startup, which currently operates in Brazil, has raised a $17.25 million Series A.
content: The HR tech startup, which currently operates in Brazil, has raised a $17.25 million Series A.
